feedItems.description: allocated £92.2m to Children's Social Care (≈£335 per resident)
allocated £124.7m to Adult Social Care (≈£453 per resident)
allocated £37.7m to Environment & Streets (≈£137 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £104 (5.0%) to £2183
